data.title: NinjaOne appoints Paul Redding as Head of MSP Partnerships to enhance growth and success for partners and customers.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, NinjaOne® unveiled the selection of Paul Redding as the new Head of MSP Partnerships. Redding's primary responsibilities will involve overseeing NinjaOne's collaborations with MSPs to drive growth and achievement for partners and customers. In this position, he will empower MSPs to enhance revenue scalability, elevate operational efficiency, and enhance client value using automated endpoint management and security tools. With extensive experience spanning decades, Redding is poised to lead the company into a successful partnership expansion phase.

data.title: Cloudflare introduces new capabilities for Zero Trust platform to aid secure AI adoption. Enables control over generative AI.
data.description: In San Francisco, Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) unveiled enhanced functions for its Cloudflare One Zero Trust platform aimed at supporting organizations in securely embracing emerging generative AI applications. The company's latest capabilities empower customers to automatically assess, analyze, and establish regulations for the utilization of generative AI across their operations, thereby bolstering productivity.

data.title: Authvia integrates Visa Direct for real-time payouts via text, enabling instant delivery to Visa debit cards.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Authvia, a prominent player in conversational commerce and text-based payment technology, revealed today the integration of Visa Direct, Visa’s platform for instantaneous money transfers, into its TXT2PAY® system. This strategic move allows Authvia to enable real-time disbursements to eligible Visa debit cards, leveraging the advanced capabilities of both technologies. This integration opens up new possibilities for industries such as healthcare, automotive services, and insurance by facilitating swift fund delivery directly to customers' cards.

data.title: Apptegy's SchoolCEO Conference 2025 equips education leaders with enrollment strategies amid increased competition. Sept 24-25 in Little Rock.
data.description: In Little Rock, Arkansas, a prominent provider of communication and brand management solutions for school districts, Apptegy, has declared the SchoolCEO Conference 2025's return. This specialized event aims to assist education leaders in navigating the competitive landscape for students and families' attention. Scheduled for September 24-25, 2025, at the Sta, the two-day conference will offer proven strategies for attracting and retaining families amidst the challenges of school choice. Such conferences become crucial as schools nationwide seek to stand out in the educational sector.

data.title: Keep Inc, largest online fitness platform in China, reports RMB821.8 million total revenues for first half of 2025.
data.description: Beijing, On August 25, 2025, Keep Inc., the leading online fitness platform in China, revealed its unaudited interim financial results for the first six months concluding on June 30, 2025. The highlights included total revenues of approximately RMB821.8 million for the specified period.

data.title: EpicQuest Education raises $3.7M in offering for higher education services in US, Canada, and UK.
data.description: In Toledo, Ohio, on August 25, 2025, EpicQuest Education Group International Limited (NASDAQ: EEIQ), a leading higher education provider for both domestic and international students in the US, Canada, and the UK, revealed its latest development. The company disclosed that it has initiated its entry into...

data.title: DHL integrates eCommerce and Express services into Shopify for US merchants to offer cost-effective international shipping.
data.description: Shopify has recently integrated DHL eCommerce and DHL Express services into their platform. This integration allows Shopify merchants to utilize both Delivered Duty Unpaid (DDU) and Delivered Duty Paid (DDP) services for international shipping. Prior to this integration, these cost-effective shipping solutions from DHL eCommerce were not accessible to Shopify merchants. The integration provides access to a wide range of shipping options for Shopify sellers.

data.title: Boxabl Inc. acquires 10 Bitcoin as part of its treasury strategy, demonstrating commitment to innovation and financial growth.
data.description: Boxabl Inc., a prominent player in modular home manufacturing, has recently put their treasury strategy into action with the purchase of 10 Bitcoin ("BTC"). This move aligns with the plan they had revealed in May, signaling their involvement in the crypto space. This acquisition showcases their commitment to diversifying their assets and staying ahead in the industry. The purchase of 10 BTC demonstrates a significant investment in the digital currency, highlighting Boxabl's proactive approach to financial management.

data.title: U.S. Agricultural Tractor Market to reach $32.1B by 2033 from $20.73B in 2024, with 4.98% CAGR. High demand in key states like California, Texas.
data.description: A new report titled "U.S. Agricultural Tractor Market Analysis: Trends, Demand, and Forecast" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. According to the report, the United States Agricultural Tractor Market is projected to grow from US$20.73 billion in 2024 to US$32.1 billion by 2033, representing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 4.98% from 2025 to 2033. The demand for agricultural tractors in the U.S. varies across states, with significant interest observed in key farming regions such as Iowa, California, and Texas. This demand is primarily influenced by factors such as crop diversity, farm sizes, and market conditions.

data.title: Lambda is using Supermicro's NVIDIA Blackwell GPU servers for AI factories, improving speed and efficiency.
data.description: Supermicro has enhanced its AI infrastructure by incorporating GPU-optimized servers, resulting in quicker outcomes. Large-scale AI factories for both training and inference have been set up in remarkably fast time frames. The implementation of Supermicro's cutting-edge liquid-cooling technology has led to decreased power and cooling expenses, promoting energy efficiency and environmental sustainability. This development took place in San Jose, where the company is headquartered.

data.title: Cécred launches Protection Collection for protective styles & extensions, offering high-performance care. 52-time award-winning Foundation Collection. Los Angeles, Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Cécred has introduced its latest Protection Collection after the success of the highly acclaimed Foundation Collection, which has won 52 awards. The new line specifically caters to protective styles and extensions, a segment that has historically been neglected. The launch took place in Los Angeles on August 25, 2025. This collection offers high-performance products backed by scientific research to provide effective care.

data.title: York Space Systems delivers 21 satellites for Tranche 1 launch, final spacecraft shipped to launch site.
data.description: In Denver, York Space Systems has officially finished and sent out its last spacecraft to the launch site for the forthcoming Tranche 1 Transport Layer launch.

data.title: Monarch® launches MonarchOne™ platform for essential industries, focusing on autonomy and AI.
data.description: In Livermore, California, Monarch has unveiled the MonarchOne™ Platform, aiming to boost autonomy and AI in vital global sectors. This launch is set to significantly impact industries by enhancing technological capabilities.

data.title: Janaína Torres named Godmother of Celebrity Xcel, the world's best female chef. Aims to celebrate culture through cuisine.
data.description: Celebrity Cruises and Torres have joined forces to honor culinary expertise and cultural appreciation. In an exciting announcement on Aug. 25, 2025, in Miami, Celebrity Cruises revealed Janaína Torres as the Godmother of Celebrity Xcel. This marks a significant moment as Torres becomes the first Brazilian chef to receive this honor. This partnership signifies a dedication to celebrating diverse cuisines and experiences.

data.title: Trade your clothes at Chicago O'Hare Airport for Kings Hawaiian soft merchandise or visit KingsHawaiian.com for purchase. Limited-edition softwear line available. Los Angeles, Aug. 25, 2025.
data.description: Exchange the clothes you have on at Chicago O'Hare International Airport for a cozy sweatsuit and travel gear, or visit KingsHawaiian.com to buy the exclusive Softwear Line. The popular King's Hawaiian® brand is commemorating a recent event in Los Angeles on August 25, 2025.

data.title: FIRST Insurance Funding and ePayPolicy integrate to simplify premium financing access in the insurance industry.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, in Northbrook, Illinois, FIRST Insurance Funding revealed its partnership with ePayPolicy to streamline access to its premium financing offerings for insurance companies. This collaboration aims to enhance the efficiency of the payment process at checkout, providing added convenience.

data.title: RSM US LLP obtains CMMC Level 2 certification as ESP for government contractors in Chicago on August 25, 2025.
data.description: In Chicago on August 25, 2025, RSM US LLP, a top provider of assurance, tax, and consulting services for the middle market, has successfully reached Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level 2 as an External Service Provider (ESP). This accomplishment signifies a significant step in enhancing their cybersecurity practices in compliance with industry standards.

data.title: EVERFI chosen as financial education resource for NYC public schools, reaching largest district in US; leader in K-12 digital finance education.
data.description: EverFi, a prominent provider of digital financial education for K-12 public schools in the US and Puerto Rico, was recently chosen as one of the two approved high school financial education resources for New York City. This decision highlights the company's leading role in delivering financial literacy programs to students. The selection will impact a significant number of high school students in New York City, underlining the importance of such educational resources in empowering youth with essential financial skills.
